title: Those Who Make Tomorrow
director: Akira Kurosawa, Hideo Sekigawa, Kajirô Yamamoto
actors: Takashi Shimura, Kenji Susukida, Masayuki Mori
plot: Two sisters, one a dancer and the other a script supervisor at a big movie studio, become embroiled in union activities when a strike is called in sympathy with striking railroad workers, one of whom boards with the sisters and th...
